modules.sql: SELECT CAST(strftime('%H', txn_timestamp) AS INTEGER) AS hour_of_day, COUNT(*) AS txn_count, ROUND(SUM(CAST(amount AS REAL)), 2) AS total_amount, strftime('%Y-%m-%d', MAX(ifw_effective_date)) AS ifw_effective_date FROM transactions GROUP BY CAST(strftime('%H', txn_timestamp) AS INTEGER) ORDER BY hour_of_day ASC
